title: Manifest remove, push
body:
Implements podman manifest remove and podman manifest push.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5976) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
can this get an approval label?
